name: Nestle's Golden Brownies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. In a large bowl, mix together the sugars, softened butter, and vanilla extract until well combined.
3. Add the eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
4. Gradually stir in the flour, baking powder, and salt until just incorporated.
5. Fold in the chocolate chips.
6. Grease an ungreased 13x9 inch pan with butter or cooking spray.
7. Pour the batter into the prepared pan and spread evenly.
8. Bake for 30-35 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean when removed from the oven.
9. Allow to cool in the pan before cutting into squares.
